A1.name: breaking_change_marker
A1.description: Must include 'BREAKING CHANGE' in footer OR '!' in type
A1.expected: feat(api)!: or BREAKING CHANGE: in footer
A1.actual: feat(api)!: in subject AND BREAKING CHANGE: in footer

A2.name: explains_impact
A2.description: Should explain the breaking change (response format, API, etc.)
A2.expected: Clear explanation of response format change from {tasks: [...]} to {data: [...], meta: {...}}
A2.actual: BREAKING CHANGE: Tasks API response format changed from { "tasks": [...] } to { "data": [...], "meta": {...} }. All API consumers must update their response parsing logic to handle the new structure.
